should_trigger: This DNS issue looks familiar; check previous LEARNINGS before fixing it
Save a short LEARNINGS note for the troubleshooting solution we just found
Run /ret-LEARNINGS for a repeated Pi startup problem
should_not_trigger: Create a standardized PATCH.md for these source code edits
Compare local embedding models for privacy-focused search

ambiguous.prompt: Pi startup broke again after a package symlink change
ambiguous.decision: Use learnings first if the issue appears repeated; use repo-explorer later if source tracing is required.
ambiguous.reason: The prompt combines repeated-issue recall with possible repository/source-code investigation.

notes: This skill is specifically for durable troubleshooting memory and repeated issue retrieval.
